name: io.github.ipayx-technologies/mcp-fx-audit
description: FX forensic audit MCP server. Detects hidden bank markups on cross-border payments. Returns score (1-10), spread analysis, and hidden fee calculation. Four tools: check_fx_mid_market_rate, audit_fx_transaction, full_forensic_fx_report, compare_fx_sources. FINTRAC-registered MSB (Canada).
